title: Fears Grow That Iran May Be Using Proxy Groups Beyond Mideast
summary_full: The charges against Mohammad al-Saadi in the United States have raised concerns that Iran could be working with its proxies to stage attacks outside the region.
summary_public: The charges against Mohammad al-Saadi in the United States have raised concerns that Iran could be working with its proxies to stage attacks outside the region.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran could be working with its proxies to stage attacks outside the region.
